evidence_summary: On October 3, 2022, Pfizer Inc. announced the completion of its acquisition of Biohaven Pharmaceutical Holding Company Ltd. for approximately $11.6 billion in cash. As a result of the transaction, Biohaven Pharmaceutical Holding Company Ltd. became a wholly-owned subsidiary of Pfizer. Prior to the closing, Biohaven spun off its non-CGRP pipeline assets into a new independent publicly traded company called Biohaven Ltd.
